hero.tagline: Where every morning is a celebration
about.title: Our Story
about.p1: Eva's Restaurante was born from a single passion: to transform every morning into an unforgettable experience. In the heart of La Paz, we've created a space where Mexican culinary tradition meets contemporary creativity.
about.p2: Every dish is crafted with fresh, local ingredients — from our daily-baked brioche to our house-made salsas. Here, brunch isn't just a meal — it's a ritual.
about.p3: We invite you to sit down, savor, and celebrate the flavors that make every visit something special.
menu.title: Menu
menu.note: We do not offer half orders. Any modifications may incur an extra charge.

experience.brioche.title: Artisan Brioche
experience.brioche.desc: Baked fresh daily in our kitchen, the foundation of our French toast and sandwiches.
experience.smoothies.title: Protein Smoothies
experience.smoothies.desc: Made with Habits vegan protein for a nutritious and delicious brunch.
experience.mexican.title: Mexican Tradition
experience.mexican.desc: Chilaquiles, barbacoa, cochinita pibil — the classics reimagined with love.
experience.coffee.title: Cafe de la Olla
experience.coffee.desc: Brewed with piloncillo and cinnamon, a tradition that warms the soul.
